scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:sync && cap run android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && node scripts/run-android-gradle.mjs assembleDebug
scripts.android:bundle: node scripts/check-android-signing.mjs && npm run android:sync && node scripts/run-android-gradle.mjs bundleRelease
